The park is very beautiful, it's just not easy to find a place to park. However, everything is careful and organized.

The lake has been a favorite go-to in general. There are plenty of activities and random people who are more than willing to offer a conversation, along with random pets. The nature has been quite unique when various bird species like geese, crows, and bald eagles can be in the same vicinity.
This is a  busy park on Green Lake.  There is a walking/biking trail that runs around the lake. The total path is about 3 miles.
